goal_text:
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have 'a star of 2' and should 'include free wifi'.
The hotel should 'include free parking' and should be in the 'east'.
Make sure you get 'hotel type'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have a star of 2 and should include free wifi
The hotel should include free parking and should be in the east
Make sure you get hotel type
